title: US government bans Anthropic's most powerful models, sparking debate on safety and censorship
summary: The US administration blocks the use of Claude Fable 5, prompting protests from cybersecurity experts and criticism over the control of artificial intelligence.

title: Fox acquires Roku for $22 billion
summary: Television network Fox buys streaming platform Roku in a mixed cash and stock deal.

title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
summary: Salesforce acquires Fin, an AI agent platform for customer service, to strengthen its enterprise AI offering.

title: OpenAI records historic losses of up to $38.5 billion in 2025
summary: OpenAI's losses multiply despite its growth, and the company plans to go public to finance its operations.

title: SpaceX goes public with a record $85.7 billion IPO
summary: Elon Musk's space company debuts on the stock market with a massive valuation, highlighting drastic launch cost reductions.

title: UK bans social media for under-16s
summary: The British government implements a blanket ban on minors' access to social platforms, with additional control measures.

title: Sundar Pichai booed at Stanford graduation ceremony over Google's ties to Israel and ICE
summary: Google CEO faces protests and boos from graduates during his speech, while some media outlets note that the reasons are more complex.

title: Microsoft restructures Xbox division with layoffs, studio closures, and possible spinoff
summary: Microsoft plans layoffs in Xbox, the closure of Ninja Theory studio, and a possible separation of the gaming business.

title: Hetzner raises prices by up to 175% amid market adjustment
summary: Hosting provider Hetzner implements a drastic price increase, sparking controversy among its customers.

title: Movistar launches new WiFi 7 router and drops Smart WiFi 7 due to memory issues
summary: Memory crisis forces Movistar to replace its Smart WiFi 7 with a new WiFi 7 router and XGS-PON variant.

title: Iroh 1.0 launches with stable key-based addressing and multilingual support
summary: The Iroh networking platform reaches version 1.0, offering stable addressing and broad programming language support.

title: DeepSeek receives external funding for the first time valued at $50 billion
summary: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek accepts external investment for the first time, reaching a valuation of $50 billion.

title: Sarvam becomes new AI unicorn in India with $234 million in funding
summary: Indian startup Sarvam raises $234 million led by HCLTech to develop AI models.

title: Nvidia issues $20 billion in bonds to fund AI expansion
summary: Nvidia joins the AI debt boom with a massive bond issuance to finance its data centers.

title: Pokémon Go data trained an AI linked to military drones
summary: A study reveals that Pokémon Go data was used to train AI systems now associated with military drones.

title: Microsoft allows running AI models locally on Windows 11 using any GPU
summary: PCs without Copilot+ NPU can now run language models locally thanks to opening AI to standard GPUs.

title: Arm presents Neural Dawn to compete with DLSS and FSR on mobile
summary: Neural Dawn technology integrates AI into Mali GPUs to improve real-time graphics through neural reconstruction.

title: Threads reaches 500 million users and adds customization and community features
summary: Meta's social network reaches half a million users and introduces new tools to improve user experience.

title: ChatGPT market share falls below 50% for the first time
summary: OpenAI's assistant loses dominance against growing competition from alternatives like DeepSeek and Claude.

title: Apple updates App Store guidelines and will remove outdated apps
summary: Apple updates its policies to remove low-quality apps with no recent updates from its store.
